qa_pairs.question: Which episodes titled exactly "Harm" have an episode number at most 16?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.title = 'Harm' AND episode.episode <= 16
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which episode entities with title equal to 'Harm' and episode at most '16'?

qa_pairs.question: What episodes from the series Law and Order aired on or before 1999-02-24?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.air_date <= '1999-02-24' AND episode.series = 'Law and Order'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which episode entities with air date at most '1999-02-24' and series equal to 'Law and Order'?

qa_pairs.question: Which episodes have the episode number exactly 18?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.episode = 18

qa_pairs.question: Which episodes from season 9 or later of Law and Order have the title Bait, are exactly episode 3, have a number in the series of at least 184, and received at most 159 votes?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.episode = 3 AND episode.title = 'Bait' AND episode.series = 'Law and Order' AND episode.number_in_series >= 184 AND episode.votes <= 159 AND episode.season >= 9
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which episode entities with episode equal to '3' and title equal to 'Bait' and series equal to 'Law and Order' and number in series at least '184' and votes at most '159' and season at least '9'?

qa_pairs.question: Which episodes titled exactly Tabula Rasa have a rating of 8.1, aired on or before 1999-04-20, come from season 9 or earlier, and have episode number at most 19 and series number at most 200 with no more than 190 votes?

WHERE episode.number_in_series <= 200 AND episode.episode <= 19 AND episode.title = 'Tabula Rasa' AND episode.rating = 8.1 AND episode.votes <= 190 AND episode.air_date <= '1999-04-20' AND episode.season <= 9

qa_pairs.question: Which episodes of Law and Order titled Ramparts have a rating of 8.0 with at least 181 votes, appear in season 9 or earlier and episode 11 or earlier, have a number in series no more than 192, and include the specified episode image?

qa_pairs.question: Which episodes belong to the series Law and Order and have associated keywords?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
WHERE episode.series = 'Law and Order'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which episode entities with series equal to 'Law and Order', having at least one related keyword record (linked on episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id)?

qa_pairs.question: Which episodes titled Empire have won awards in 1999 or earlier?

JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
